label: Risk
title: Crime should feel dangerous.
description: The best criminal roleplay comes with pressure, planning, and the genuine chance of failure when you get careless.

label: Crew
title: The underworld works better together.
description: Many of the strongest criminal stories come from trusted crews, shared jobs, betrayals, and reputations that spread across the city.

label: Consequence
title: Every move should matter.
description: Police attention, rival groups, evidence trails, and failed plans all create long-term story hooks instead of one-off scenes.
